titleStmt.title: Letter from Sister Angela to Thomas Kirkpatrick, 31 March 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Sister Angela

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Letter from Sister Angela of North Infirmary in Cork to Thomas Kirkpatrick stating that she will be unable to attend the conference to consider Sir Arthur Stanley's proposal to establish a school of nursing.From 1910 until 1954 Thomas Kirkpatrick (1869-1954) served as the registrar for the Royal College of Physicians of Ireland. He also served as the general secretary of the Royal Academy of Medicine in Ireland. He took a particular interest in what were then termed venereal diseases; to encourage his patients (many of whom were prostitutes) to attend, he held a clinic for women at a discreet early morning hour to facilitate anonymity.

msIdentifier.repository: Royal College of Physicians of Ireland

correspAction.placeName: Royal College of Physicians, Kildare Street, Dublin, Ireland

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
North Infirmary Cork March 31 st 1916 Dear Sir I am in receipt of
your letter of the 28th inst.
and regret to say I am
unable to attend the conference
on Tuesday April 4 th to
consider the proposal of the
Hon Arthur Stanley to found
a College of Nursing. Believe me
Yours faithfully Sister Angela
Supt of Nurses T.P.C. Kirkpatrick Esq
